venue.name: MetLife Stadium
venue.address: 1 MetLife Stadium Dr, East Rutherford, NJ 07073
venue.event: FIFA World Cup 2026 — USA vs Portugal

gates.name: Gate A
gates.directions: From the main plaza, head north along the outer ring road. Gate A is on the north side with blue signage. Elevator access on the left.
gates.accessible_route: Use the paved accessible path to the left of the main entrance. Blue ramp markers lead to Gate A accessible entry. Elevator EB-1 immediately inside.

gates.name: Gate B
gates.directions: Walk east from the main plaza past the Team Store. Gate B is at the end of the northeast walkway.
gates.accessible_route: Accessible path via the northeast ramp. Elevator EB-2 is 30m past Gate B turnstiles.

gates.name: Gate C
gates.directions: Head east from the main plaza, cross the pedestrian bridge. Gate C is on your right — follow yellow wayfinding markers.
gates.accessible_route: Step-free access via the east accessible corridor. Ramp entrance 40m before the main turnstiles, marked with blue wheelchair signs. Elevator EB-3 inside.

gates.name: Gate D
gates.directions: Continue southeast from Gate C past the F&B village. Gate D is at the southeastern corner.
gates.accessible_route: Gate D has no step-free entry. Please use Gate C (7 min) or Gate E (accessible) instead.

gates.name: Gate E
gates.directions: From the southern parking lots, Gate E is directly ahead. From the main plaza, head south along the outer ring for 10 min.
gates.accessible_route: Accessible entry via south ramp. Lift SE-1 immediately past turnstiles.

gates.name: Gate G (Premium)
gates.directions: Gate G is the premium/club entrance directly west of the main plaza. Look for silver signage.
gates.accessible_route: Premium accessible lane — no ramp needed. Elevator PL-1 to club level.

C.directions: Enter Gate C, follow East concourse signs to Section C. Rows 1-15 are field-level; rows 16-30 are upper field.

accessible_facilities.location: Section 101-102 corridor, left of Gate A concession stand
20m past Gate C turnstiles on the right, East concourse
First Aid Room NA-1, Section 102 tunnel entrance. Open 24h during event. Paramedics on site.
First Aid Station EC-1, 30m past Gate C on the left. Paramedics on site.
Elevator bank EB-1, immediately inside Gate A turnstiles, left side. Serves levels 1, 2, 3.
Elevator bank EB-3, 50m past Gate C. Serves levels 1, 2, 3.
Fan Services Booth FS-1, next to Gate A. Open during event hours.
